titles.title: In The Presence Of A Holy God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: And I cry holy, holy, holy God How awesome is Your Name Holy, holy, holy God How majestic is Your Name And I am changed In the presence of a holy God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the presence of a holy God There’s new meaning now to grace You took all my sins upon Yourself I can only stand amazed

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the presence of Your infinite might I'm so small and frail and weak When I see Your power and wisdom, Lord I have no words left to speak

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the power of Your glory All my crowns lie in the dust You are righteous in Your judgments, Lord You are faithful true and just
